stemHtml: A flight crew has been on standby duty for 4 hours at an airport. This standby will count as _____ of duty time.

options.a: None, (as airport standby does not count as duty time).
options.b: 2 hours (as airport standby counts as 50% duty time).
options.c: 4 hours, (as airport standby counts in full as duty time).
options.d: 6 hours, (as airport standby counts as 150% duty time).
